documents.title: Zurich school renovation
documents.text: Zurich City Council approved CHF 12 million to renovate the Waidberg secondary school. Construction is scheduled to begin in September 2026.

documents.title: Zurich park proposal
documents.text: Zurich City Council rejected an CHF 8 million proposal to redesign the lakeside park after concerns about maintenance costs.

documents.title: Tramlinie 2 gesperrt
documents.text: Die Zürcher Verkehrsbetriebe sperren die Tramlinie 2 zwischen Bellevue und Tiefenbrunnen vom 3. bis 17. August 2026 wegen Gleisarbeiten.

documents.title: Tramlinie 4 fährt normal
documents.text: Die Tramlinie 4 in Zürich verkehrt während der Sommerferien nach dem regulären Fahrplan und ist von den Bauarbeiten nicht betroffen.

documents.title: Berner Mieterschutz
documents.text: Der Berner Stadtrat nahm die neue Mieterschutzverordnung mit 43 zu 27 Stimmen an. Sie tritt am 1. Januar 2027 in Kraft.

documents.title: Buslinie 10 umgeleitet
documents.text: Bernmobil leitet die Buslinie 10 ab Montag für sechs Wochen über den Viktoriaplatz um, weil die Kornhausbrücke saniert wird.

documents.title: Eau potable à Lausanne
documents.text: La Ville de Lausanne a ordonné de faire bouillir l'eau dans trois quartiers après la détection d'une contamination bactérienne. L'avis reste valable jusqu'à vendredi.

documents.title: Tarifs des transports lausannois
documents.text: Le Conseil communal de Lausanne a approuvé une réduction de dix pour cent du prix des abonnements de transports publics pour les moins de 25 ans.

documents.title: Basler Spitalbeitrag
documents.text: Der Grosse Rat Basel-Stadt bewilligte einen zusätzlichen Beitrag von fünf Millionen Franken für die Notfallstation des Universitätsspitals.

documents.title: Kürzung beim Museum
documents.text: Basel-Stadt kürzt den jährlichen Betriebsbeitrag an das Stadtmuseum um zwei Millionen Franken ab 2027.

documents.title: Bozeman zoning ordinance
documents.text: The Bozeman City Commission adopted Ordinance 2135, allowing duplexes on residential lots within the urban core. The measure passed four votes to one.

documents.title: Bozeman warehouse vote delayed
documents.text: The Bozeman City Commission postponed a vote on the proposed North Park warehouse development until October 6 after requesting a traffic study.

documents.title: Madison library closure
documents.text: Madison's Central Library will close on July 14 and reopen on July 21 while crews replace the building's electrical switchgear.

documents.title: Madison pool hours
documents.text: Goodman Pool in Madison will extend its opening hours until 9 p.m. during the heat advisory from July 15 through July 18.

documents.title: Strassensperre in Zermatt
documents.text: Die Kantonsstrasse nach Zermatt bleibt nach einem Lawinenabgang mindestens bis Dienstagmorgen gesperrt. Reisende sollen die Bahn benutzen.

documents.title: Zusätzliche Züge nach Zermatt
documents.text: Die Matterhorn Gotthard Bahn setzt am Wochenende zwei zusätzliche Züge zwischen Visp und Zermatt ein.

documents.title: OpenAI UK filing
documents.text: OpenAI UK Ltd filed its annual accounts with Companies House on June 30, 2026. The filing lists the company's registered office in London.

documents.title: DeepMind filing
documents.text: Google DeepMind Technologies Limited appointed a new company secretary in a filing submitted to Companies House on July 2, 2026.

documents.title: École à Fribourg
documents.text: Le Conseil général de Fribourg a accordé un crédit de 18 millions de francs pour construire une école primaire dans le quartier de Beaumont.

documents.title: Raccolta rifiuti a Lugano
documents.text: La Città di Lugano introdurrà la raccolta settimanale dei rifiuti organici in tutti i quartieri a partire dal primo novembre 2026.

documents.title: Protection contre les expulsions
documents.text: Le canton de Genève prolonge jusqu'au 31 mars 2027 la protection hivernale qui suspend certaines expulsions de locataires vulnérables.

documents.title: Sanierung der Seebrücke
documents.text: Die Stadt Luzern beginnt am 5. Oktober mit der Sanierung der Seebrücke. Eine Fahrspur bleibt während der achtmonatigen Arbeiten offen.

documents.title: Veloweg in Winterthur
documents.text: Winterthur bewilligte 3,4 Millionen Franken für einen geschützten Veloweg entlang der Technikumstrasse.

documents.title: Hochwasserschutz in Chur
documents.text: Die Stadt Chur warnt wegen starker Regenfälle vor Überschwemmungen entlang der Plessur und schliesst vorsorglich zwei Uferwege.

dedup_pairs.left: Zurich approved CHF 12 million to renovate Waidberg secondary school.
dedup_pairs.right: The Waidberg school renovation received twelve million francs in funding from Zurich.

dedup_pairs.left: Tram line 2 will be closed between Bellevue and Tiefenbrunnen from August 3 to 17.
dedup_pairs.right: Vom 3. bis 17. August fährt die Tramlinie 2 zwischen Bellevue und Tiefenbrunnen nicht.

dedup_pairs.left: Lausanne issued a boil-water notice in three neighbourhoods after bacterial contamination.
dedup_pairs.right: Après la découverte de bactéries, trois quartiers lausannois doivent faire bouillir l'eau.

dedup_pairs.left: Basel's parliament granted the university hospital emergency department an extra CHF 5 million.
dedup_pairs.right: Die Notfallstation des Universitätsspitals erhält vom Grossen Rat zusätzlich fünf Millionen Franken.

dedup_pairs.left: Bozeman adopted Ordinance 2135 by a four-to-one vote.
dedup_pairs.right: Ordinance 2135 passed the Bozeman City Commission with four votes in favour and one against.

dedup_pairs.left: Madison Central Library closes July 14 for electrical work and reopens July 21.
dedup_pairs.right: Electrical switchgear replacement will shut Madison's central library from 14 July until 21 July.

dedup_pairs.left: The cantonal road to Zermatt remains closed until at least Tuesday morning after an avalanche.
dedup_pairs.right: Nach einem Lawinenabgang bleibt die Kantonsstrasse nach Zermatt mindestens bis Dienstagmorgen gesperrt.

dedup_pairs.left: OpenAI UK Ltd filed annual accounts with Companies House on June 30, 2026.
dedup_pairs.right: Companies House received OpenAI UK Limited's yearly accounts on 30 June 2026.

dedup_pairs.left: Bern approved the tenant-protection ordinance by 43 votes to 27.
dedup_pairs.right: Mit 43 gegen 27 Stimmen nahm der Berner Stadtrat die Mieterschutzverordnung an.

dedup_pairs.left: Lugano will begin weekly organic-waste collection across every district on November 1, 2026.
dedup_pairs.right: Dal primo novembre 2026 tutti i quartieri di Lugano avranno la raccolta settimanale dei rifiuti organici.

dedup_pairs.left: Geneva extended its winter eviction protection through March 31, 2027.
dedup_pairs.right: La protection hivernale genevoise contre certaines expulsions est prolongée jusqu'au 31 mars 2027.

dedup_pairs.left: Lucerne starts renovating the Seebrücke on October 5 and will keep one lane open.
dedup_pairs.right: Die Sanierung der Luzerner Seebrücke beginnt am 5. Oktober; eine Fahrspur bleibt offen.

dedup_pairs.left: Winterthur approved CHF 3.4 million for a protected cycle lane on Technikumstrasse.
dedup_pairs.right: Für den geschützten Veloweg an der Technikumstrasse bewilligt Winterthur 3,4 Millionen Franken.

dedup_pairs.left: Chur closed two riverside paths because heavy rain raised the flood risk along the Plessur.
dedup_pairs.right: Wegen Hochwassergefahr an der Plessur sperrt die Stadt Chur vorsorglich zwei Uferwege.

dedup_pairs.left: Fribourg granted CHF 18 million to construct a primary school in Beaumont.
dedup_pairs.right: Une école primaire sera construite à Beaumont grâce à un crédit fribourgeois de 18 millions de francs.

dedup_pairs.left: Zurich approved CHF 12 million for the Waidberg school renovation.
dedup_pairs.right: Zurich rejected an CHF 8 million redesign of the lakeside park.

dedup_pairs.right: Tram line 4 will run normally throughout the summer holidays.

dedup_pairs.left: Lausanne ordered residents in three districts to boil drinking water.
dedup_pairs.right: Lausanne reduced public-transport subscription prices for residents under 25.

dedup_pairs.left: Basel granted the university hospital an additional CHF 5 million.
dedup_pairs.right: Basel cut the city museum's annual grant by CHF 2 million.

dedup_pairs.left: Bozeman adopted Ordinance 2135 by four votes to one.
dedup_pairs.right: Bozeman postponed the North Park warehouse vote until October 6.

dedup_pairs.left: Madison Central Library reopens July 21 after electrical work.
dedup_pairs.right: Madison's Goodman Pool will remain open until 9 p.m. during the heat advisory.

dedup_pairs.left: The road to Zermatt is closed after an avalanche.
dedup_pairs.right: The railway will add two weekend trains between Visp and Zermatt.

dedup_pairs.left: OpenAI UK filed annual accounts on June 30, 2026.
dedup_pairs.right: Google DeepMind appointed a new company secretary on July 2, 2026.

dedup_pairs.left: Bern approved the tenant-protection ordinance.
dedup_pairs.right: Bernmobil diverted bus route 10 because of bridge repairs.

dedup_pairs.left: The city approved the school construction budget.
dedup_pairs.right: The city has only proposed the school construction budget and has not approved it.

dedup_pairs.right: The council approved CHF 21 million for the project.

dedup_pairs.left: The library closes on July 14 and reopens July 21.
dedup_pairs.right: The library closes on July 21 and reopens July 28.

dedup_pairs.left: The measure passed by four votes to one.
dedup_pairs.right: The measure failed by four votes to one.

dedup_pairs.left: The road will remain closed until Tuesday morning.
dedup_pairs.right: The road reopened on Tuesday morning.

dedup_pairs.left: Geneva extended tenant eviction protection through March 2027.
dedup_pairs.right: Lausanne ended tenant eviction protection in March 2027.
